Minimal native wrapper requirements:  1. launch `vanta desktop --no-open` or equivalent child process 2. open a native window to the local URL 3. forward close/restart events cleanly 4. expose file picker, directory picker, clipboard image paste, and PTY bridge 5. package/sign only after approval prompt flow is stable  Do not claim packaged desktop is shipped until a real native shell builds and opens the current local server.
